title: Custom Enchantments 2
description: 70+ Custom Enchants, Lucky Loots, RPG feels and more, its Free!
body:
## **THIS PLUGIN IS NO LONGER MAINTAINED PLEASE [SEE CE3](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/102275/)**

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306186078743a37ff2ea8a9381751b34875f4378.png)

### **Description**
- A plugin that brings fun into the server, this plugin contains Custom Enchantments, Lucky Treasures, Custom Equipment Status, and more!!
- Turn your vanilla Minecraft to the next level! Plus, it's a **FREE** plugin!

### **NOTE:**
- The developer is not responsible for any issues if you have a lot of plugins in your server causing plugin incompatibility.

### **How do I open the enchantment shop?**
- Simple, just type `/enchantshop` or `/es` to open the custom enchantment shop GUI.

### **Enchant Shop GUI**

![guishowcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07fe976b8b2b44979df400501d4a3a1e9ef42732.png)

### **How do I change the enchantment prices?**
- After you run the plugin for the first time, it will generate a `config.yml` where you can edit the prices.

### **What version of Minecraft should I use?**
- This custom enchantment v2 plugin was developed on Minecraft version 1.16.4 and has been tested to work in the new version 1.16.5. It also supports all versions of 1.16 but it is highly recommended to use 1.16.4 for stable use.
- Version 2.0.6A and above will only work on 1.17+

### **How do I enchant my stuff?**
1. Right-click on the enchantment book in your main hand.
2. Switch to your tool/weapon/armor that you want to enchant.
3. Right-click again while holding the item in your main hand.
4. For an enchanting tutorial, click [here](https://youtu.be/s3p2KSzvu70). (2.1.0 up)

### **Commands**
#### **Storm Ally [Deny friendly fire on a storm cast to an allied player] (2.1.0 up)**
- `/storm_ally_list` - Show the list of storm allies
- `/storm_all {player}` - Add a player to storm ally list
- `/remove_storm_ally {player}` - Remove a player in storm ally list

#### **Commands**
- `/customenchantment` or `/ce` - Access to reload, give, and remove
- `/ce reload` - Reloads the config.yml
- `/ce give [enchantment]` - Gives you a specific custom enchantment
- `/ce remove [enchantment] {player}` - Removes an enchantment from an item that the player holds
- `/ce particles` - Enable/disable player particles
- `/ce foodpocket` - Enable/disable foodpocket
- `/ce hideParticipate` - Hide player from showing on boss defeat participation event
- `/ce item [class]` - Get a class of items that can only be found through lucky treasures
- `/ce glow` - Glows a player when they have Custom Enchants
- `/ce worldguard` - Disable enchants from breaking blocks in a region (2.1.4 and below)
- `/ce resethealth` - Resets all players' health to 20.0 (2.1.4 and up)
- `/enchantshop` or `/es` - Opens the Shop GUI to buy custom enchantments

### **Soft Dependency plugins (This plugin can still run without these plugins)**
- [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/34315/) and [Essentials](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/9089/) (2.1.3h and below)
- [PvPManager](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/pvpmanager-lite.845/)
- [Kumandra's Economy](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/96466/)
- [WorldGuard](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard) (2.1.4 up)

### **UPDATE 2.1.4 and above:**
> Bosses and Raids are removed, it has been transferred to a new plugin **[EpicMobs](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/epic-mobs-1-17.97476/)**

### **Update 3.0.0 and above:**
> Version 3.0.0+ is Custom Enchantments 3. Sadly, it is on premium. The version you download on this page is just a free version of CE3. If you want to buy Custom Enchants 3, go [here](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/%E2%9C%AF-custom-enchantments-3-rpg-%E2%9C%AF-1-18-1-19-premium.102275/).

![opgear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a15e13f599a81c499eadc8e189a32fe7011efe2.png)

### **Support the developer's effort! ❤️**

### **Help the developer by donating:**
- A small **[dollar](https://sites.google.com/view/jaymarplugins/support)** is a lot for the **developer's** effort 😉
- Or subscribe to my channel **[JayMar921](https://www.youtube.com/c/JayMar921)** on YouTube ❤️

![aternos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b78dcd922e2dbcfd8c5e6d1bcce5d26aad5d975.png)

### **Is this plugin available in Aternos?**
- **Yes**, it is available!
- How to download? [Watch this video](https://youtu.be/hV9b2ZAV8gQ).
- How to configure the plugin in Aternos? [Watch this video](https://youtu.be/nsztWAP-4YM).
- Custom Enchants on Aternos: [Click here](https://aternos.org/addons/a/spigot/89793)

### **Is there a plugin wiki?**
- Yes there is! Click here -> **[Custom Enchantments Wiki](https://jaymar921.github.io/jaymar_plugin_wiki/custom_enchantments.html)**
